description: Historically problematic AI-assistant questions (timeouts / excessive tool-call loops / tool errors), mined from production chat history. Replay them with the replay_chat harness to regression-test agent changes. See README.md in this folder.
source: production ChatMessage.debug_meta on assistant turns where error_count>0 OR tool_call_count>=15, deduped by question, disambiguation-flow/trivial turns excluded.

questions.question: Transfers Operated {O}
questions.note: Bare measure name; historically re-called the schema tool repeatedly on ambiguous matches. Should disambiguate once and stop, not loop.
